untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental/valuation metrics (book-to-market ratio, cash-flow-to-price, earnings-to-price, past sales growth rate) that are not available in the allowed technical indicator set. These are cross-sectional value factors requiring access to financial statement data and historical growth rates, not price/volume technical indicators.
translation_notes: SSRN_227016_2 is a value vs. glamour reversion strategy based on fundamental valuation multiples and historical growth. The allowed indicator set contains only technical indicators (moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, etc.) and cannot capture the required fundamental metrics. To implement this signal, a custom data source providing book value, cash flows, earnings, and sales growth data would be needed, along with cross-sectional ranking logic to identify value vs. glamour quintiles.
